subagents.finding: Frank Farrell is safe for a narrow display-only, record-specific rule. The Metropolitan Transportation Authority pair should remain unresolved pending representation-policy or alias-hygiene review.

entity_groups.decision: High-confidence display-only disambiguation. Existing do-not-merge keeps the records separate because payload entity_type differs, and each record has exact title/agency payload context.
Deferred. Current payloads and override trail indicate a representation-policy/alias-hygiene issue, not a safe display-label cleanup.

implemented_changes.summary: Added exact reviewed display-name guards for the two Frank Farrell records. Gates require record_id, original display name, entity_name, entity_type, title, and for the NYCT record agency_name.
Added regression coverage for the Frank Farrell reviewed display labels.

changed_entity_labels.display_name: Frank Farrell, MTA Acting EVP of Buses/MTA Bus Company
Frank Farrell, MTA NYCT EVP of Buses

remaining_entity_exact_display_duplicate.reason_deferred: Subagent and local audit found the broad MTA parent pair has contaminated merged type/context values and a cautionary override trail. Leave for representation-policy or alias-hygiene repair rather than display-only relabeling.

next_lanes: MTA parent representation-policy / alias-hygiene review for entity_mta-entity-update-2025 and entity_mta-metropolitan-transportation-authority.
Metric tail repair for date-shaped rows via event/date representation rather than unit coercion.
Mis-scoped workforce_development metric repair via retirement/replacement if source context supports it.
